title: User Guides - Onboarding screens
scenario: Verify that onboarding screens can be accessed from App Settings > User Guides and that navigating through all onboarding screens displays correct content.
steps: Open the app and go to App Settings.
Locate and tap on 'Onboarding Screens' (or similar option).
Navigate through all onboarding screens (e.g., swipe or tap Next/Continue).
Verify that each screen displays the correct content (text, images, illustrations, etc.).
expected: All onboarding screens are accessible from App Settings > User Guides, and each screen displays the correct content as designed.
